summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing (100% success) and partial frontend testing. Backend fully functional, frontend loads correctly but browser automation encountered environment issues.

browser_automation_issues.issue: Browser crashes with SIGSEGV signal in container environment
browser_automation_issues.error: Failed to connect to dbus, browser process terminated unexpectedly
browser_automation_issues.workaround: Manual testing or different browser automation setup needed

passed_tests: ✅ Dashboard API - returns KPI data correctly
✅ Projects API - list and search functionality
✅ Units API - list and filtering by status
✅ CRM/Leads API - list and create operations
✅ Deals API - list and status filtering
✅ Siteplan API - multiple view modes (sales, construction, finance, management)
✅ WhatsApp API - MOCKED integration working correctly
✅ Dev Report API - development progress tracking
✅ Lead Import API - bulk lead import functionality
✅ Frontend loads correctly with glassmorphism UI
✅ Login page displays properly with correct form elements
✅ Proper redirect to login page for unauthenticated users

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (partial testing due to browser automation issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Backend is fully functional. Frontend loads correctly but browser automation testing failed due to container environment issues. Recommend manual testing of frontend interactions or fixing browser automation setup. All core APIs are working perfectly.
